name: quarterly_minutes
description: Minutes of the Quarterly Review (q.side_minutes) end-to-end: enter the Hua Zhan branch office lobby (the tick poller self-latches hz_office_warned within 10b of the office staff), hold the top-floor door landing unseen for 8 continuous seconds to overhear the review (hz_minutes_heard + the Quarterly Minutes paper prop), confirm Chen Bao's post-reading line, then jump cross-map to Sango and file the minutes with Lucian Scrollkeeper (hz_minutes_filed, 400 CD + 2 super potions). No prerequisite tags are faked — the opening latch arms in-scenario; the preamble removes sting_memo_taken/yield_report_taken so Lucian's two higher-priority turn-ins (77/76) cannot shadow the minutes entry (75).

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag/score/item the chain sets --
-- neutralize Lucian's higher-priority turn-ins (memo712@77, rezoning@76) so minutes_turn_in@75 surfaces --
-- beat 1: the branch office lobby — Ning's desk arms the hz_office_warned latch --

-- beat 2: the top-floor door landing. tp, NOT path_to: analyst Lan's DIALOG-mode sight cone covers the stairwell and the Walker pauses under a surprise screen (documented Walker behavior), so the vertical A* leg would stall mid-flight --
8 unseen seconds within 6b of Chen Bao: CLEAR countdown, then the review reads itself out
-- beat 2b: Chen Bao's post-reading line (stage-1 target NPC; we are already on his landing, walk_to is a no-op leg) --

expect_screen_text: The quarterly is closed. The door was closed. The hallway is not a stakeholder, and yet here you are, standing like someone who has heard numbers.
Whatever you think you heard, the numbers were strong. They are always strong. That is what the word means now. Leave before I have to notice you.

steps.comment: -- beat 3: cross-map jump to Sango (Hua Zhan -> Sango is ~1350 blocks, not a town-internal leg) — Lucian files the minutes --
Lucian's approach_once sight may auto-open her open_file dialog on a fresh player; screen.close is a no-op when nothing is open

expect_screen_text: Minutes. Actual branch minutes, initialed and circulated, and someone let them walk out the door. Regional Manager Shade signs like someone who has signed over another name — the hand drags where the old letters used to go.

And the closing boilerplate again, pressed one rank higher this time. Insistence is a fingerprint, and this one is climbing the org chart. Hand them here — the archive pays a records fee for live Company paper.
